taxonomy: Grastidium phragmitoides belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. This classification places Grastidium phragmitoides within the monocot group of flowering plants. Further classification positions it in the tribe Phragmitoideae, a group of aquatic grasses. Grastidium phragmitoides is also known to be a part of the genus Grastidium, which is a small group of plants. The specific classification of Grastidium phragmitoides reflects its unique characteristics as an aquatic grass species.
